actions.leaf_title: Implement temperature conversion module with affine logic

revised.title: Complete temperature conversion module beyond the skeleton
revised.content:
The landed skeleton defines the module surface but no conversion logic. Fill in the affine conversion functions for C/F/K.

Files: unitconv/temperature.py, tests/test_temperature.py

Acceptance criteria:
- all skeleton TODOs replaced by working affine conversions
- anchor identities pass: 0C=32F, -40C=-40F, 0C=273.15K

Test expectations: anchor-identity tests in tests/test_temperature.py

actions.rationale: Under-cap failure; revised spec stays inside the strict LeafSpec vocabulary.
